summary: ACCEPT. Independent architecture review finds the R3 M2 save/load runtime extension acceptable: it keeps the existing Save Envelope v1 boundary, adds explicit serializable M2 DTO state with nested schemaVersion guards, preserves M1 golden/corrupt behavior, rejects missing/malformed/future/cross-manifest M2 data with structured reasons before runtime replacement, and keeps M2-HOST-HASH-CANARY-001 dependency-gated on this task.

tests_run.result: On branch feat/m2-save-runtime. Implementation changes are confined to packages/save-format/src/index.ts, packages/sim-core/src/command-query-v1.ts, tests/save-load-contract.test.ts, and allowed project orchestration/task/message files; no package manifest or lockfile changes were present.

Reviewed explicit M2 DTO addition, parser/copy paths, loadSaveV1 missing-state semantic rejection, and M2 contract tests. No React/Pixi/Electron/DOM/Node IO import was added to sim-core or save-format.

tests_run.command: git diff -- package.json pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml packages/save-format/package.json packages/sim-core/package.json packages/protocol/package.json
tests_run.result: No dependency, workspace, package manifest, or lockfile changes.
save-format imports only @monsoon/protocol; sim-core imports protocol, save-format, and local sim modules; Node fs usage is confined to the test file for fixture loading.
No forbidden entropy/time/object-graph serialization patterns found in touched implementation files.

tests_run.command: rg -n 'react|pixi|electron|node:fs|fs/promises|from fs|from path|from crypto|from os' -- packages/save-format/src/index.ts packages/sim-core/src/command-query-v1.ts
tests_run.result: No UI, renderer, Electron, platform IO, or Node module keyword matches in touched implementation files.
Vitest passed: 2 files, 10 tests. M1 golden/corrupt behavior and M2 save/load contract tests passed.
Vitest passed: 9 files, 47 tests. Existing MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning for tests/fixtures/deterministic-rng-worker.ts remains non-blocking.
Node/Worker hello hash 61e0ba1c matched; command/query hash d275faa4 matched; save/load hash 28074edd matched; save/load byte length 10920.
Architecture boundaries passed; deterministic canaries matched; root Vitest passed 19 files/91 tests; web Vitest passed 1 file/3 tests.

decisions: Accepted keeping Save Envelope schemaVersion at v1 because the change is an explicit optional state.m2 extension inside the already approved WorldState v0 snapshot DTO boundary, with M2-specific schemaVersion guards on the M2 DTO and transport DTO.

Accepted the dependency direction: save-format defines serializable DTO/parser/copy code without sim-core imports; sim-core owns runtime semantic validation and only replaces runtime after decode, semantic validation, event-tail hydration, and invariant checks pass.
Accepted M1 compatibility evidence: golden save checksum/state hash and corrupt-save rejection tests still pass, and M1 saves continue to omit state.m2.
Accepted M2 runtime evidence: economy, population, agriculture, market, route, and transport state round-trip through save/load and reproduce the saved state hash.

Accepted rejection semantics: missing M2 data rejects as semantic-invariant at state.m2; malformed/future M2 schema rejects as invalid-schema under body.authoritativeSnapshot.state.m2; cross-manifest rejects at header.contentManifestHash; all checked rejection paths preserve the original runtime hash.
Confirmed M2-HOST-HASH-CANARY-001 remains DRAFT and explicitly depends on M2-SAVE-RUNTIME-001 before using save/load hashes.
risks: No blocking architecture risk found. The remaining scenarioIdForRuntime fallback for non-M1 graph runtimes is acknowledged as outside this task and does not affect the explicit M2 state preservation/rejection contract reviewed here.
No production dependency, platform persistence, compression, database, IndexedDB, Electron IPC, UI/client/map-renderer, or formal historical content expansion was introduced.
Future Save Envelope or M2 DTO revisions must add explicit migration or structured rejection tests before loading older/newer M2 state.
requested_action: Lead orchestrator may proceed with integration/closure handling for M2-SAVE-RUNTIME-001 and, after closure, route dependency-ready M2-HOST-HASH-CANARY-001 without relying on implicit or omitted M2 save/load state.
